action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py truncation caused proxy-only runs (3-9 maps, scores 0.55-0.78) and inconsistent success; best full-test remains 0.6057 (success=0.873, dist=338m from alpha=2.5/beta=1). Analysis: heuristic (global max (util**beta)/(dijkstra_dist**alpha+1) + next-hop) is strong 0-param frontier planner using real ExplorationEnv/node graph; root cause was long code leading to cutoff in workspace + fragile fallback/config. New alpha=2.5/beta=1.2 slightly boosts high-utility clusters for better room coverage/lower dist. Decision: overwrite with compact COMPLETE predict.py (all dists dijkstra once, robust coord handling, exact contract JSON with per_episode/per_type/success-only dist, config+glob fallback for 9-map proxy, full try/except), update train.py with new params/v13 desc, run train+proxy validation, submit_eval for official full-test score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
